overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk-style food court transitioning to an outdoor waterfront promenade at dusk. The video begins in a neon-lit indoor market with purple and cyan lighting, moves through a transition corridor with digital billboards, and emerges onto an open waterfront with views of a futuristic city skyline.

notable_agents.action: sitting at a table under a white umbrella, eating
vendor working behind a food counter with Japanese lanterns

food counter illuminated with bright cyan neon lighting
food service counter with purple neon underlighting
large white patio umbrellas over seating areas
traditional-style paper lanterns with Japanese characters hanging above counter

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a covered food court illuminated by vibrant purple and cyan neon lights. A glass roof structure spans overhead, while various food stalls line the walkway. White umbrellas shade seating areas where a few people are dining, and Japanese-style paper lanterns hang above one of the counters.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor with digital billboards leading to outdoor plaza

events.description: exiting the covered food court through glass doors into a transitional corridor
lighting shifts from neon artificial to natural dusk as moving toward outdoor area

agents.ego_description: walking through glass exit doors from the indoor food court to an outdoor covered walkway

notable_agents.action: walking away from camera wearing a red jacket
sitting at a table under a white umbrella

entered.detail: large glass double doors marking the exit from the food court
large illuminated advertisement for All Foods featuring a cartoon character
white patio umbrellas in the outdoor transition area
tall bamboo plants in planters along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions as the camera exits the food court through glass doors into a covered outdoor corridor. Digital billboards become visible, including a prominent All Foods advertisement. The lighting shifts from artificial neon to the natural blue hour of dusk as the camera moves toward the open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with city skyline view at dusk

events.description: emerging from covered corridor into fully open waterfront area with unobstructed sky
approaching a parked van and a standing figure near the waterfront railing

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade toward the city skyline, approaching a parked vehicle

notable_agents.action: standing near the waterfront railing, looking out at the city view

entered.detail: futuristic high-rise buildings and towers silhouetted against the dusk sky
body of water reflecting the city lights and dusk sky
tall structure with multiple rotating digital advertisement screens
modern concrete seating blocks arranged along the promenade
dark-colored delivery van parked near the waterfront railing
small illuminated food cart with yellow signage

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges onto a wide-open waterfront promenade with an unobstructed view of the futuristic city skyline across the water. The sky is clear with the deep blue tones of dusk. The camera passes concrete benches and a rotating digital billboard structure, approaching a parked black van and a lone figure standing near the waterfront railing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit indoor food court that gradually opens into a wide waterfront promenade at dusk. It begins by gliding through a covered market illuminated by vibrant purple and cyan lights, passing under a glass roof and beneath Japanese-style paper lanterns. As the camera exits through glass doors, the scene shifts into a covered outdoor corridor where artificial neon gives way to the natural blue hour of dusk and digital billboards, including an All Foods advertisement, come into view. The environment then expands as the camera emerges onto an open plaza, revealing a futuristic city skyline across the water under a clear, deep blue sky. Finally, the movement passes concrete benches and a rotating digital structure before approaching a parked black van and a lone figure standing by the waterfront railing.
